NAME: Host genetics & gut microbiome (Nat Genet perspective)
DESCRIPTION: Perspective on microbial GWAS (mbGWAS): state of the art, heterogeneity of microbiome assays, power, and directions for genetic analysis of the gut microbiome.
CITATION: Sanna S, Kurilshikov A, van der Graaf A, et al. (2022) Challenges and future directions for studying effects of host genetics on the gut microbiome. Nat Genet, 54:100–106. doi:10.1038/s41588-021-00983-z. PMID 35115688
